title: Battery Oprated Christmas LED Lights Decorations Angel Silhouette Hemp Rope Lights Xmas Holiday Home Wall Room Hanging Décor
features: Blending rustic design with contemporary character, our decorative indoor light features a natural hemp rope frame in the shape of a traditional Angel. Hemp rope silhouette - Suitable for interior and exterior decoration.
Suitable as an indoor light, the festive angel is woven around with a string of 44 LED lights, whose warm glow will help to illuminate your home for a cosy atmosphere on the dark winter evenings.
The natural colour will complement any style of seasonal décor whether modern or classic, and the handy loop at the top means it can be easily hung from a hook or hanger throughout your home.

They are widely used in courtyards, gardens, bedrooms, bars, clubs, weddings, terraces, gazebos, barbecues, dinners, cafes, birthday parties, Christmas decorations and more. Create beautiful lights and a warm atmosphere.

Easy to operate and setup, create a relaxing ambiance in seconds. Suitable for indoor and outdoor decorations, can withstand many kinds of weather. Shape Size: 34 x 50cm. 3 X AA Battery Operated (not included)
description: RUSTIC HEMP ROPE LIGHT DESIGN: If you want to go for that earthy, bohemian aesthetic vibe for your interior, you might want to have a close look at our rope silhouette. It’s got that rustic look going and will be great for adding tasteful accent lighting to your home.Specifications: It consist angel shape metal frame wrapped with hemp rope and 44 warm white LEDs copper string lights. Light Colour: Warm White. Shape: Angel. Size:- 39 x 44cm. Lead wire: 30cm. Battery Operated. 3 x AA Battery Required (Not Included).
